entry.em: ..HEAT ADVISORY IN EFFECT UNTIL 11 AM CDT TUESDAY
entry.data: EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT FROM 11 AM TO 7 PM CDT TUESDAY

MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 106 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
NORTHEAST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS AROUND 80
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
LOWS IN THE MID 60S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
